browserQA.note: Browser QA not performed in this automated session. Manual QA required for: authenticated checkout → /orders/:orderId; refresh confirmation; Build Your Box confirmation; guest confirmation; unauthorized access state.
browserQA.knownGap: No Playwright E2E suite exists; QA is manual only

deliveredOutcomes: Refresh-safe confirmation loading from backend API
Backend idempotency key (Idempotency-Key header, sparse unique index, fingerprint)
Seed-mode idempotency (in-memory map with fingerprint check)
Guest order confirmation token (SHA-256 hash stored, raw token returned once, sessionStorage on client)
Guest order GET access via ?token= query param
Customer-safe error messages for stock/product failures
Account order history 'View full order' link to /orders/:orderId
Place Order button disabled during submission
remainingLimitations: No MongoDB multi-document transaction (sequential conditional updates with rollback)
Guest token does not persist across browser sessions (sessionStorage only)
No email confirmation sent to guest customers
